attributes.action: Add fantasm back to the creamfields lineup 2026
attributes.additional_details: Due the the fact hes been proven innocent and doesn't deserve to be treated this way when he hasn't done any of the allegations put against him
attributes.background: Fantasm sadly got removed from the creamfields lineup due to allegations put against him but he has been taken to court in lyon and was fount innocent but the information keeps getting brought up by a individual who is trying to ruin his career
